title: dolichothele nelsonii
intro: Dolichothele nelsonii, also known as the Nelson's dolichothele, is a species of leafless, epiphytic orchid native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dolichothele nelsonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Dolichothele nelsonii can be made by infusing the plant's roots in hot water, and it is often used in traditional medicine in the Pacific Islands.
